name: fidacy
description: Payment firewall for AI agents — signed, independently verifiable verdicts on every money-moving action. Blocks wrong-payee, over-cap and duplicate-invoice (BEC) fraud before it settles.

plugins.name: fidacy-payment-firewall
plugins.description: Ships the @fidacy/mcp server (request_payment, verify_mandate, get_audit_proof, assess_action, upgrade) plus two skills: the payment firewall doctrine and the Fraud Detector for forged approvals. Free, local-first, deny-by-default, non-custodial.
